---
name: Content suggestion
about: Suggest a correction or improvement to existing roadmap content
title: '[Content] '
labels: content
assignees: ''

---

**Which part of the roadmap?**
File/section (e.g. `English/Tooling.md`) or the roadmap diagram (`Graph/roadmap.drawio.svg`).

**What should be changed and why?**
Describe the correction or improvement. If something is factually outdated
(tool pricing, book edition, C++ standard coverage), please include a source.

**Which languages does this affect?**
- [ ] English
- [ ] Russian
- [ ] Chinese
- [ ] All of them
